\tzpentry{ID4327}{Grav Field Strength Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4327 introduces Grav Field Strength Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$F_{grav} \propto \rho_{vac} \cdot V_{obj} \cdot \int \delta g_{\mu\nu} dV$
\]
